MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Manaement Corporation is present. Represented by Jeff McCormick.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Wilfredo Sanchez-Asevedo is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Player representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Aug -20-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
